author: grumpydev
description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Sync your vault directly with GitHub APIs on desktop and mobile.

manifest.author: grumpydev
manifest.description: Sync your vault directly with GitHub APIs on desktop and mobile.
manifest.name: Octosync

name: Octosync

releases.author: grumpydev
releases.description: Fixes file/folder path-shape conflicts by detecting them during sync planning before local or remote changes are applied. Also adds a narrow fallback for Obsidian modifyBinary File already exists errors when replacing an existing file.
releases.name: Octosync 1.0.5

releases.author: grumpydev
releases.description: Fixes manual sync confirmation for empty plans. When no upload, download, delete, folder, or conflict work is required, Octosync now skips the confirmation modal and reports that everything is up to date.
releases.name: Octosync 1.0.4

releases.author: grumpydev
releases.description: Fixes the settings header logo on mobile by rendering the bundled icon inline instead of loading logo.png from the plugin folder.
releases.name: Octosync 1.0.3

releases.author: grumpydev
releases.description: Community review follow-up release.\n\nIncludes the latest README/settings screenshot tooling and carries forward the review recommendation fixes: no clipboard API usage, no builtin-modules dependency, documented vault access, and attested release assets.
releases.name: Octosync 1.0.2

releases.author: grumpydev
releases.description: Community review follow-up release.\n\nUpdates release metadata and includes review recommendation fixes: no clipboard API usage, no builtin-modules dependency, documented vault access, and release asset attestation workflow.
releases.name: Octosync 1.0.1

releases.author: grumpydev
releases.description: Initial community release of Octosync.\n\nOctosync syncs an Obsidian vault directly with GitHub APIs without requiring local Git, with manual and automatic sync modes, simulation, change indicators, and conservative conflict handling.
releases.name: Octosync 1.0.0
